title: El bab el maftuh
writer: Henry Barakat, Lutfiah Elzayaat, Yussef Issa
actors: Faten Hamamah, Mahmoud Moursy, Saleh Selim
plot: Elbab Elmaftouh, Known in English as "The Open Door", another great movie about women's right in their different role and life and thier struggle between her father with his old style and her husband that doesn't understand her.
